C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc libkernels.a CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/bitwise.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/blackscholes.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/filter_gradient.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/graph.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/grff.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/image_proc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/matmul.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/relu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/sparse_spmm.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/kernels.dir/src/kernel/trace_replay.cpp.obj
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ranlib.exe libkernels.a
